name: Pontoon
description: Pontoon — Mozilla's web-based localization management tool for translating Firefox and other open-source projects.

seo.title: Pontoon — Localization / Translation API
seo.meta_description: Pontoon: Pontoon — Mozilla's web-based localization management tool for translating Firefox and other open-source projects.

when_to_use: Crowdsourced localization for Firefox and Mozilla products
Web-based translation tool for open-source communities
OSS TMS for non-profit and community localization
Contributor translation workflow with review pipeline
Multi-locale string management for Mozilla ecosystem

pros: Open source, self-hostable, no vendor lock-in
Clean web UI translators actually enjoy using
Good Git and VCS-based workflow integration
cons: Setup and operations require Django expertise
No commercial support or SLA behind it
UI and admin feel dated versus commercial tools
Fewer built-in MT and QA integrations
review.verdict: Great free OSS option for communities and open-source projects; most commercial teams will prefer a SaaS alternative.
review.best_for: Open-source projects and orgs willing to self-host localization
review.not_for: Teams without infra capacity or that need a commercial SLA

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
